purpose: Connect readers to relevant coverage — previous stories, related topics, and deeper dives that build on what they just read.
writingRules: Each related story must include title, slug, and one-line description
Maximum 6 related stories — too many choices reduces engagement
Include stories from different angles to show breadth
Label series stories clearly (Part 1, Part 2, etc.)
seoRules: Use schema.org CreativeWorkSeries for multi-part stories
Internal links should use descriptive anchor text
Related stories should be marked as 'see also' in navigation markup
